name: part_007
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_007.webm

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Aki Rosenthal perform 'Otona na Furi shite.' (Pretending to be an adult.)
speakers: アキ・ローゼンタール

scenes.description: MC section between performances. Choco changes into her new 3D adult outfit, featuring a lab coat. AZKi joins her on stage.
Yuzuki Choco and AZKi perform 'chocolate box'.

subtitles.original: 別れ際に落ち合う
subtitles.english: Meeting up when it's time to say goodbye

subtitles.original: 街の風は少し冷たい
subtitles.english: The city breeze is a bit chilly

subtitles.original: 慣れないワイン無理矢理飲み干してしまっては
subtitles.english: Forcing down wine I'm not used to drinking

subtitles.original: ふらふら
subtitles.english: I'm feeling dizzy

subtitles.original: 嫌われちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if you end up hating me?

subtitles.original: 下手しちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if I mess things up?

subtitles.original: 少しも見逃したくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to miss a single thing

subtitles.original: ちょっと期待してね
subtitles.english: Have a little expectation, okay?

subtitles.original: ずっと見栄張ってね
subtitles.english: Keep putting up a front, okay?

subtitles.original: 周りばかり気にして生きてる
subtitles.english: I live my life constantly worrying about others

subtitles.original: ちょっと優越感でも
subtitles.english: Even if it's just a little sense of superiority

subtitles.original: なんか寂しくて
subtitles.english: I somehow feel lonely

subtitles.original: 本当は自分じゃない気がして
subtitles.english: I feel like I'm not truly myself

subtitles.original: いつもわかったふりして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: Forcing myself when it's not like that at all

subtitles.original: 味のしないキスをしても
subtitles.english: Even if we share a tasteless kiss

subtitles.original: やっぱり一番嬉しくて
subtitles.english: It's still what makes me the happiest

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は可愛いのかな
subtitles.english: Am I cute even when I'm just keeping up appearances?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I break

subtitles.original: 今にも切れそうな
subtitles.english: Connected by a thread

subtitles.original: 糸で繋がってる恋だね
subtitles.english: That feels like it's about to snap at any moment

subtitles.original: 私が諦めたらきっと
subtitles.english: If I were to give up, I'm sure

subtitles.original: 簡単に消えちゃうね
subtitles.english: It would simply vanish

subtitles.original: 引き止めるにはどうする
subtitles.english: What should I do to make you stay?

subtitles.original: あの子だったらどうする
subtitles.english: What would that girl do?

subtitles.original: 不器用な指先絡めて
subtitles.english: Entwining my clumsy fingertips

subtitles.original: いつもチェックしてね
subtitles.english: Always keep an eye on me, okay?

subtitles.original: 息苦しくてね
subtitles.english: It's suffocating, you know?

subtitles.original: 他の子と比べてばかりいた
subtitles.english: I was constantly comparing myself to other girls

subtitles.original: 一番見てほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to look at me most of all

subtitles.original: 目の前のあなたは
subtitles.english: Yet you're standing right in front of me

subtitles.original: どこか違う景色見てる
subtitles.english: Gazing at a different scenery somewhere

subtitles.original: いつも優しいふりして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to be kind

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに笑って
subtitles.english: Smiling even though it's not like that

subtitles.original: 近づけば近づくほど
subtitles.english: The closer I get

subtitles.original: 孤独はどこか充満して
subtitles.english: The more the loneliness fills the air

subtitles.original: 少しずつ離れていくのがわかるよ
subtitles.english: I can feel us slowly drifting apart

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I forget everything

subtitles.original: 自分がもっと強ければさよならを
subtitles.english: If I were a bit stronger,

subtitles.original: 言えるのにね
subtitles.english: I'd be able to say goodbye, wouldn't I?

subtitles.original: いつもわかったふりして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: Forcing myself when it's not like that at all

subtitles.original: ふと見せる優しさが
subtitles.english: The kindness you suddenly show

subtitles.original: ずっと忘れられなくて
subtitles.english: Is something I can never forget

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は可愛いのかな
subtitles.english: Am I cute even when I'm just keeping up appearances?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I break

subtitles.original: そしてこぼれ出した愛は
subtitles.english: And then, the love that overflowed—

subtitles.original: 私頑張ったよね
subtitles.english: I really did my best, didn't I?

subtitles.original: いつか振り向いてねと
subtitles.english: Hoping that you'd look my way someday,

subtitles.original: 思っていたもういいから
subtitles.english: I thought... but that's enough now

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は中へとゆく
subtitles.english: My made-up self is retreating inside

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tonight until I forget everything

subtitles.original: なんかいつも眠そうだし
subtitles.english: You somehow always look sleepy,

subtitles.original: なんかいつもつまんなそうだし
subtitles.english: And you somehow always look bored,

subtitles.original: なんかいつもやばそうだし
subtitles.english: And you somehow always look like you're in trouble,

subtitles.original: なんかいつもスマホいじってるし
subtitles.english: And you're somehow always on your phone,

subtitles.original: 本当はテンション高いのに
subtitles.english: Even though you're usually high-energy,

subtitles.original: 私といる時だけ低いし
subtitles.english: It's only low when you're with me,

subtitles.original: なんなん自分ありえなくない？
subtitles.english: Seriously, what's up with you? Isn't that messed up?

subtitles.original: キライ 大キライ どうでもいい！
subtitles.english: I hate you, I really hate you! I don't care anymore!

subtitles.original: だったら僕も言うけどさ
subtitles.english: Well, if you're gonna say that, I've got things to say too.

subtitles.original: 小さい事ですごく怒るし
subtitles.english: You get mad over the smallest things,

subtitles.original: いっぱいいっぱいすぐ泣くし
subtitles.english: And you're quick to start crying when you're overwhelmed,

subtitles.original: ごめんって言っても許してくれないし
subtitles.english: And you won't forgive me even when I say sorry,

subtitles.original: そのわり急に飽きちゃえば
subtitles.english: But on top of that, if you suddenly get bored,

subtitles.original: ケッタはよ帰るとか言うし
subtitles.english: You'll just say you're taking your bike home early,

subtitles.original: あーなんて罪深き人なんだ
subtitles.english: Ah, what a sinful person you are,

subtitles.original: ちくしょう もう知らんぞ
subtitles.english: Dammit, I'm done with you!

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い恋の魔法は
subtitles.english: The sweet, sweet magic of love is

subtitles.original: 口どけ味の秘密のチョコレート
subtitles.english: A secret chocolate with a melt-in-your-mouth flavor

subtitles.original: 二人で
subtitles.english: The two of us—
